name: HDFC Infinia Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹10,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 5 Reward Points per ₹150 spent on all retail purchases
10X Reward Points on Smartbuy portal (flights, hotels, Amazon, Flipkart)

cappedCategories.description: 10X rewards capped at 25,000 bonus points per calendar month

redemptionOptions: Airmiles (1 RP = 1 Airmile for InternMiles/Singapore Airlines KrisFlyer)

insurance.travelInsurance: Up to ₹50,00,000 emergency medical cover overseas
insurance.purchaseProtection: Up to ₹5,00,000 for 90 days from purchase

additionalBenefits: Complimentary golf rounds at select courses (2 per quarter)
2 complimentary domestic airport transfers per quarter via Luxe
Complimentary Priority Pass membership for primary and add-on card
Access to HDFC Bank Dining Privileges
pros: Unlimited domestic and international lounge access
1:1 airmile transfer ratio for InternMiles and KrisFlyer
cons: High joining and annual fee of ₹10,000 each
Invite-only or very high income requirement (₹30 LPA+)
idealFor: High spenders looking to maximize airmile conversions
Users who book travel frequently via SmartBuy

faqs.question: How do I apply for the HDFC Infinia Credit Card?
faqs.answer: The HDFC Infinia is largely an invite-only card. You can get upgraded from HDFC Regalia or Diners Club Black by maintaining high spending. Some branches may issue it on request for customers with ₹30 LPA+ income.

faqs.question: How does SmartBuy 10X rewards work?
faqs.answer: When you use the SmartBuy portal to book flights, hotels, or purchase Amazon/Flipkart vouchers, you earn 10X reward points (50 RP per ₹150). This is capped at 25,000 bonus points per calendar month.

faqs.question: Can I transfer reward points to airline miles?
faqs.answer: Yes. HDFC Infinia offers 1:1 transfer to InternMiles (InterMiles) and Singapore Airlines KrisFlyer miles. This is one of the best transfer ratios available in India.

faqs.question: Is the annual fee waivable?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹10,000 annual fee is waived if you spend ₹10,00,000 or more in the previous anniversary year.
